Package space.sunqian.fs.object.convert

Interface ObjectCopier.Handler

All Known Implementing Classes:
CommonCopierHandler
Enclosing interface:
ObjectCopier
public static interface ObjectCopier.Handler
Handler for ObjectCopier, provides the specific copy logic for copying each object property to the destination object. It has 4 methods:
  • copyProperty(Object, Object, Map, MapSchema, Map, MapSchema, ObjectConverter, Option[]): from source map entry to destination map entry;
  • copyProperty(Object, Object, Map, MapSchema, Object, ObjectSchema, ObjectConverter, Option[]): from source map entry to destination object property;
  • copyProperty(String, ObjectProperty, Object, ObjectSchema, Map, MapSchema, ObjectConverter, Option[]): from source object property to destination map entry;
  • copyProperty(String, ObjectProperty, Object, ObjectSchema, Map, MapSchema, ObjectConverter, Option[]): from source object property to destination object property;
All those methods have default implementations, which directly copy properties from the source object to the target object, following the rules of the specified options defined in ConvertOption.

The thread safety of the methods in this interface is determined by its dependent ObjectConverter, BuilderOperatorProvider, and other objects. By default, they are all thread-safe.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    copyProperty(@Nonnull Object srcKey, @Nullable Object srcValue, @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> src, @Nonnull MapSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull Object dst, @Nonnull ObjectSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    This method will be invoked when copy an entry from the source map to a destination object.
    boolean
    copyProperty(@Nonnull Object srcKey, @Nullable Object srcValue, @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> src, @Nonnull MapSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> dst, @Nonnull MapSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    This method will be invoked when copy an entry from the source map to a destination map.
    boolean
    copyProperty(@Nonnull String srcPropertyName, @Nonnull ObjectProperty srcProperty, @Nonnull Object src, @Nonnull ObjectSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull Object dst, @Nonnull ObjectSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    This method will be invoked when copy a property from the source object to a destination object.
    boolean
    copyProperty(@Nonnull String srcPropertyName, @Nonnull ObjectProperty srcProperty, @Nonnull Object src, @Nonnull ObjectSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> dst, @Nonnull MapSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options)
    This method will be invoked when copy a property from the source object to a destination map.

  • Method Details

    • copyProperty

      boolean copyProperty(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object srcKey, @Nullable @Nullable Object srcValue, @Nonnull @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> src, @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws Exception
      This method will be invoked when copy an entry from the source map to a destination map. Returns false to prevent subsequent handlers to continue to copy, otherwise returns true to continue to copy.
      Parameters:
      srcKey - the key of the entry to be copied
      srcValue - the value of the entry to be copied
      srcSchema - the schema of the source map
      dst - the destination map
      dstSchema - the schema of the destination map
      converter - the converter used in the mapping process
      options - the options used in the mapping process
      Returns:
      whether to continue to copy
      Throws:
      Exception - any exception can be thrown here

    • copyProperty

      boolean copyProperty(@Nonnull @Nonnull Object srcKey, @Nullable @Nullable Object srcValue, @Nonnull @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> src, @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull Object dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws Exception
      This method will be invoked when copy an entry from the source map to a destination object. Returns false to prevent subsequent handlers to continue to copy, otherwise returns true to continue to copy.
      Parameters:
      srcKey - the key of the entry to be copied
      srcValue - the value of the entry to be copied
      srcSchema - the schema of the source map
      dst - the destination object
      dstSchema - the schema of the destination object
      converter - the converter used in the mapping process
      options - the options used in the mapping process
      Returns:
      whether to continue to copy
      Throws:
      Exception - any exception can be thrown here

    • copyProperty

      boolean copyProperty(@Nonnull @Nonnull String srcPropertyName, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectProperty srcProperty, @Nonnull @Nonnull Object src, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectSchema srcSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull Map<Object,Object> dst, @Nonnull @Nonnull MapSchema dstSchema, @Nonnull @Nonnull ObjectConverter converter, @Nonnull @Nonnull Option<?,?> @Nonnull ... options) throws Exception
      This method will be invoked when copy a property from the source object to a destination map. Returns false to prevent subsequent handlers to continue to copy, otherwise returns true to continue to copy.
      Parameters:
      srcPropertyName - the name of the property to be copied
      srcProperty - the property to be copied
      src - the source object
      srcSchema - the schema of the source object
      dst - the destination map
      dstSchema - the schema of the destination map
      converter - the converter used in the mapping process
      options - the options used in the mapping process
      Returns:
      whether to continue to copy
      Throws:
      Exception - any exception can be thrown here

    • copyProperty

      srcPropertyName - the name of the property to be copied
      srcProperty - the property to be copied

      srcSchema - the schema of the source object
      dst - the destination object
